claims.claim: At about 64% fill and high entropy, semantic persistence must survive longer than a low-entropy peer so dense interaction threads are not pruned too early by the high-fill floor.
claims.rationale: Added and ran a targeted sensory-bus test showing fill 0.64 with entropy 0.90 outlives low-entropy state and reaches the 15s anchor band through the existing bounded entropy multiplier.

claims.claim: Increasing `STALE_SEMANTIC_HIGH_MS` from 10,000 to 15,000 would change live semantic decay cadence and should not be hidden as a diagnostic.
claims.rationale: Current evidence shows the high-entropy 64% fill case already reaches the proposed 15s band; changing the global high-fill floor would affect live sensory cadence and remains a Mike/operator approval item.

claims.claim: Increasing `SHADOW_INFLUENCE_DEFAULT_DECAY_TICKS` from 12 to 24 might stabilize restless shadow texture, but it changes live shadow influence release behavior.
claims.rationale: Added a test that records the current 24-tick duration and 12-tick default decay boundary; changing the decay default to 24 is live shadow/control-adjacent and requires Mike/operator approval plus post-change monitoring.
